              <SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA SNAPSHOT_REF="snapshot_11">
                <DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT DID_REFS="did_301F did_3020 did_330C did_3B4B did_D111 did_D117 did_D118 did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD09 did_EE03 did_EE04 did_EE05 did_EE06 did_EE42 did_EED1 did_EE07 did_EE43 did_DD05 did_EE90 did_FD00 did_FE10 did_FE11" />
                <SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>1</SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>
              </SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA>
            </SNAPSHOT_PARAMETERS>
            <EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS EDR_REFS="edr_02 edr_10" />
            <WARNING_INDICATORS_REQUESTED>
              <WARNING_INDICATOR WARN_REF="warn_1" />
            </WARNING_INDICATORS_REQUESTED>
          </DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS>
          <DTC_ROUTINE_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>no</DTC_ROUTINE_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>
          <ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN>NA</ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN>
        </DTC_FAILURE_INFO>
      </DTC>
      <DTC ID="dtc_F001">
        <NUMBER>0xF001</NUMBER>
        <DESCRIPTION>Control Module Improper Shutdown Performance</DESCRIPTION>
        <DTC_FAILURE_INFO ID="dtc_F001_fi_1">
          <DTC_FTB FAILURE_REF="ftb_68" />
          <DTC_CONTINUOUS_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>yes</DTC_CONTINUOUS_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>
          <DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS>
            <OPERATION_CYCLE OP_CYCLE_REF="op_cycle_1" />
            <TEST_RUN_CRITERIA>Check is executed one after ignition on.</TEST_RUN_CRITERIA>
            <TEST_PERIOD>NA</TEST_PERIOD>
            <AGING_COUNTER EDR_REF="edr_02" />
            <AGED_COUNT STATUS_BIT_REF="status_bit_3">40</AGED_COUNT>
            <FDC_INC_VALUE>1</FDC_INC_VALUE>
            <FDC_DEC_VALUE>1</FDC_DEC_VALUE>
            <FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA>Fail Criteria:

This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU detects power loss in previous power cycle.



Pass Criteria:

This DTC goes automatically to inactive state in the next power cycle.</FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA>
            <ECU_FAULT_ACTION>No action beside the logging of the lost supply voltage DTC.</ECU_FAULT_ACTION>
            <FAULT_SYMPTOM>Asssist loss can be detected by the driver.</FAULT_SYMPTOM>
            <SNAPSHOT_PARAMETERS>
              <SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA SNAPSHOT_REF="snapshot_10">
                <DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT DID_REFS="did_301F did_3020 did_330C did_3B4B did_D111 did_D117 did_D118 did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD09 did_EE03 did_EE04 did_EE05 did_EE06 did_EE42 did_EED1 did_EE07 did_EE43 did_DD05 did_EE90 did_FD00 did_FE10 did_FE11" />
                <SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>1</SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>
              </SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA>
              <SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA SNAPSHOT_REF="snapshot_11">
                <DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT DID_REFS="did_301F did_3020 did_330C did_3B4B did_D111 did_D117 did_D118 did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD09 did_EE03 did_EE04 did_EE05 did_EE06 did_EE42 did_EED1 did_EE07 did_EE43 did_DD05 did_EE90 did_FD00 did_FE10 did_FE11" />
                <SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>1</SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>
              </SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA>
            </SNAPSHOT_PARAMETERS>
            <EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS EDR_REFS="edr_02 edr_10" />
            <SPECIAL_CONSIDERATIONS>Note for service: 

STEP 1  Check if testFailedThisMonitoringCycle = 1 go to STEP 2.  If testFailedThisMonitoringCycle = 0 go to STEP 3.    

STEP 2  Check the cabling of the EPAS. Check the ground connection, relay and fuse of PSCM. Check the battery voltage of the vehicle.    

STEP 3  Clear DTC and perform a proper ignition cycle. DTC should not present.  If present go to STEP 1.



Note for the Eol operator: 

PSCM DTC 0xF00168 (U3001-68) is appearing during flashing or hard reset and could to be masked continuously and in history at pre-rolls, dynamic and static. 

For gate-code check if it is in history only.   

This could also happens due to 12 V disconnect and reconnect.</SPECIAL_CONSIDERATIONS>
          </DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS>
          <DTC_ROUTINE_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>no</DTC_ROUTINE_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>
          <ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN>NA</ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN>
        </DTC_FAILURE_INFO>
      </DTC>
      <DTC ID="dtc_F003">
        <NUMBER>0xF003</NUMBER>
        <DESCRIPTION>Battery Voltage</DESCRIPTION>
        <DTC_FAILURE_INFO ID="dtc_F003_fi_1">
          <DTC_FTB FAILURE_REF="ftb_16" />
          <DTC_CONTINUOUS_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>yes</DTC_CONTINUOUS_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>
          <DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS>
            <OPERATION_CYCLE OP_CYCLE_REF="op_cycle_1" />
            <TEST_RUN_CRITERIA>If all of the following conditions are fulfilled:

1) Hardwired ignition is ON

2) 5000 milliseconds have been elapsed start-up

3) Power steering assist is provided</TEST_RUN_CRITERIA>
            <TEST_PERIOD>2ms</TEST_PERIOD>
            <AGING_COUNTER EDR_REF="edr_02" />
            <AGED_COUNT STATUS_BIT_REF="status_bit_3">40</AGED_COUNT>
            <FDC_INC_VALUE>1</FDC_INC_VALUE>
            <FDC_DEC_VALUE>1</FDC_DEC_VALUE>
            <FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA>Fail Criteria:

This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU measures lower than 9V battery voltage



Pass Criteria:

This DTC goes inactive if the ECU measures higher than 9V battery voltage</FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA>
            <ECU_FAULT_ACTION>1. Assist will be disabled

2. EPAS_Failure signal is kept on EPAS_OK_NO_MESSAGE (0x0) value

3. SteMdule_D_Stat signal is set to Normal_Op_Limited_Assist (0x1) value</ECU_FAULT_ACTION>
            <FAULT_SYMPTOM>1. No power steering assist</FAULT_SYMPTOM>
            <SNAPSHOT_PARAMETERS>
              <SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA SNAPSHOT_REF="snapshot_10">
                <DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT DID_REFS="did_301F did_3020 did_330C did_3B4B did_D111 did_D117 did_D118 did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD09 did_EE03 did_EE04 did_EE05 did_EE06 did_EE42 did_EED1 did_EE07 did_EE43 did_DD05 did_EE90 did_FD00 did_FE10 did_FE11" />
                <SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>1</SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>
              </SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA>
              <SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA SNAPSHOT_REF="snapshot_11">
                <DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT DID_REFS="did_301F did_3020 did_330C did_3B4B did_D111 did_D117 did_D118 did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD09 did_EE03 did_EE04 did_EE05 did_EE06 did_EE42 did_EED1 did_EE07 did_EE43 did_DD05 did_EE90 did_FD00 did_FE10 did_FE11" />
                <SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>1</SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>
              </SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA>
            </SNAPSHOT_PARAMETERS>
            <EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS EDR_REFS="edr_02 edr_10" />
            <SPECIAL_CONSIDERATIONS>Note for service:

STEP 1  check if testFailedThisMonitoringCycle = 1 go to STEP 2  If  testFailedThisMonitoringCycle = 0 go to STEP 3.    

STEP 2  Charge the battery above 12V. Perform ignition cycle. If successful go to STEP3, else go to STEP4.    

STEP 3  Clear DTC and perform a proper ignition cycle. DTC should not present.  If present go to STEP 1.    

STEP 4  Further investigation is needed on ground connection, battery, generator, power management side and PSCM wiring harness, related circuit and connectors.</SPECIAL_CONSIDERATIONS>
          </DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS>
          <DTC_ROUTINE_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>no</DTC_ROUTINE_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>
          <ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN>NA</ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN>
        </DTC_FAILURE_INFO>
        <DTC_FAILURE_INFO ID="dtc_F003_fi_2">
          <DTC_FTB FAILURE_REF="ftb_17" />
          <DTC_CONTINUOUS_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>yes</DTC_CONTINUOUS_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>
          <DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS>
            <OPERATION_CYCLE OP_CYCLE_REF="op_cycle_1" />
            <TEST_RUN_CRITERIA>If all of the following conditions are fulfilled:

1) Hardwired ignition is ON

2) 5000 milliseconds have been elapsed start-up

3) Power steering assist is provided</TEST_RUN_CRITERIA>
            <TEST_PERIOD>2ms</TEST_PERIOD>
            <AGING_COUNTER EDR_REF="edr_02" />
            <AGED_COUNT STATUS_BIT_REF="status_bit_3">40</AGED_COUNT>
            <FDC_INC_VALUE>1</FDC_INC_VALUE>
            <FDC_DEC_VALUE>1</FDC_DEC_VALUE>
            <FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA>Fail Criteria:  

This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU measures higher than 19V battery voltage    



Pass Criteria:  

This DTC goes inactive if the ECU measures lower than 18V battery voltage</FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA>
            <ECU_FAULT_ACTION>1. Assist will be slightly or highly reduced

2. EPAS_Failure signal is kept on EPAS_OK_NO_MESSAGE (0x0) value

3. SteMdule_D_Stat signal is set to Normal_Op_Limited_Assist (0x1) value</ECU_FAULT_ACTION>
            <FAULT_SYMPTOM>1. Steering assist is reduced</FAULT_SYMPTOM>
            <SNAPSHOT_PARAMETERS>
              <SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA SNAPSHOT_REF="snapshot_10">
                <DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT DID_REFS="did_301F did_3020 did_330C did_3B4B did_D111 did_D117 did_D118 did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD09 did_EE03 did_EE04 did_EE05 did_EE06 did_EE42 did_EED1 did_EE07 did_EE43 did_DD05 did_EE90 did_FD00 did_FE10 did_FE11" />
                <SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>1</SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>
              </SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA>
              <SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA SNAPSHOT_REF="snapshot_11">
                <DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT DID_REFS="did_301F did_3020 did_330C did_3B4B did_D111 did_D117 did_D118 did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD09 did_EE03 did_EE04 did_EE05 did_EE06 did_EE42 did_EED1 did_EE07 did_EE43 did_DD05 did_EE90 did_FD00 did_FE10 did_FE11" />
                <SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>1</SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>
              </SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA>
            </SNAPSHOT_PARAMETERS>
            <EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS EDR_REFS="edr_02 edr_10" />
            <SPECIAL_CONSIDERATIONS>Note for service:

STEP 1  check if testFailedThisMonitoringCycle = 1 go to STEP 2  If  testFailedThisMonitoringCycle = 0 go to STEP 3.    

STEP 2  Charge the battery above 12V. Perform ignition cycle. If successful go to STEP3, else go to STEP 4.    

STEP 3  Clear DTC and perform a proper ignition cycle. DTC should not present.  If present go to STEP 1.    

STEP 4  Further investigation is needed on ground connection, battery, generator, power management side and PSCM wiring harness, related circuit and connectors.</SPECIAL_CONSIDERATIONS>
          </DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS>
          <DTC_ROUTINE_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>no</DTC_ROUTINE_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>
          <ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN>NA</ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN>
        </DTC_FAILURE_INFO>
        <DTC_FAILURE_INFO ID="dtc_F003_fi_3">
          <DTC_FTB FAILURE_REF="ftb_68" />
          <DTC_CONTINUOUS_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>yes</DTC_CONTINUOUS_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>
          <DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS>
            <OPERATION_CYCLE OP_CYCLE_REF="op_cycle_1" />
            <TEST_RUN_CRITERIA>If all of the following conditions are fulfilled:

1) Hardwired ignition is ON

2) 5000 milliseconds have been elapsed start-up

3) Power steering assist is provided</TEST_RUN_CRITERIA>
            <TEST_PERIOD>2ms</TEST_PERIOD>
            <AGING_COUNTER EDR_REF="edr_02" />
            <AGED_COUNT STATUS_BIT_REF="status_bit_3">40</AGED_COUNT>
            <FDC_INC_VALUE>1</FDC_INC_VALUE>
            <FDC_DEC_VALUE>1</FDC_DEC_VALUE>
            <FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA>Fail Criteria:  

This DTC is raies (testFailedThisMonitoringCycle=1) if the ECU measures the battery voltage between 8V and 11V 

   

Pass Criteria:  

This DTC goes inactive if the ECU measures higher than 11V battery voltage</FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA>
            <ECU_FAULT_ACTION>1. Assist will be disabled

2. EPAS_Failure signal is kept on EPAS_OK_NO_MESSAGE (0x0) value

3. SteMdule_D_Stat signal is set to Normal_Op_Limited_Assist (0x1) value</ECU_FAULT_ACTION>
            <FAULT_SYMPTOM>1. No power steering assist</FAULT_SYMPTOM>
            <SNAPSHOT_PARAMETERS>
              <SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA SNAPSHOT_REF="snapshot_10">
                <DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT DID_REFS="did_301F did_3020 did_330C did_3B4B did_D111 did_D117 did_D118 did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD09 did_EE03 did_EE04 did_EE05 did_EE06 did_EE42 did_EED1 did_EE07 did_EE43 did_DD05 did_EE90 did_FD00 did_FE10 did_FE11" />
                <SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>1</SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>
              </SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA>
              <SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA SNAPSHOT_REF="snapshot_11">
                <DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT DID_REFS="did_301F did_3020 did_330C did_3B4B did_D111 did_D117 did_D118 did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD09 did_EE03 did_EE04 did_EE05 did_EE06 did_EE42 did_EED1 did_EE07 did_EE43 did_DD05 did_EE90 did_FD00 did_FE10 did_FE11" />
                <SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>1</SAMPLES_SNAPSHOT_DATA_PER_RECORD>
              </SNAPSHOT_RECORD_DATA>
            </SNAPSHOT_PARAMETERS>
            <EXTENDED_DATA_PARAMETERS EDR_REFS="edr_02 edr_10" />
            <SPECIAL_CONSIDERATIONS>Note for service:

STEP 1  check if testFailedThisMonitoringCycle = 1 go to STEP 2  If  testFailedThisMonitoringCycle = 0 go to STEP 3.    

STEP 2  Charge the battery above 12V. Perform ignition cycle. If successful go to STEP3, else go to STEP 4.    

STEP 3  Clear DTC and perform a proper ignition cycle. DTC should not present.  If present go to STEP 1.    

STEP 4  Further investigation is needed on ground connector, battery, generator, power management side and PSCM wiring harness, related circuit and connectors.</SPECIAL_CONSIDERATIONS>
          </DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS>
          <DTC_ROUTINE_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>no</DTC_ROUTINE_MONITORING_SUPPORTED>
          <ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN>NA</ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN>
        </DTC_FAILURE_INFO>
      </DTC>
      <DTC ID="dtc_F008">
        <NUMBER>0xF008</NUMBER>
        <DESCRIPTION>Control Module Ground "A"</DESCRIPTION>
        <DTC_FAILURE_INFO ID="dtc_F008_fi_1">
          <DTC_FTB FAILURE_REF="ftb_1B" />

    <ROUTINE_IDENTIFIERS>
      <ROUTINE ID="routine_0301" SERVICE_REFS="service_31" SESSION_REFS="session_02" SECURITY_REFS="security_level_1">
        <NAME>Activate Secondary Boot-loader</NAME>
        <NUMBER>0x0301</NUMBER>
        <MAX_ROUTINE_RUN_TIME>200</MAX_ROUTINE_RUN_TIME>
        <RESTART_WHILE_RUNNING>no</RESTART_WHILE_RUNNING>
        <ROUTINE_START_PARAMETERS>
          <ROUTINE_REQUEST_PARAMETERS>
            <ROUTINE_PARAM>
              <NAME>Request Additional Data</NAME>
              <BYTE_SIZE>4</BYTE_SIZE>
              <SUB_FIELD ID="routine_0301_subfield_1">
                <NAME>Memory Address</NAME>
                <LEAST_SIG_BIT>0</LEAST_SIG_BIT>
                <MOST_SIG_BIT>31</MOST_SIG_BIT>
                <DATA_DEFINITION>
                  <DATA_TYPE>bytes</DATA_TYPE>
                </DATA_DEFINITION>
              </SUB_FIELD>
            </ROUTINE_PARAM>
          </ROUTINE_REQUEST_PARAMETERS>
          <ROUTINE_RESPONSE_PARAMETERS>
            <ROUTINE_PARAM>
              <NAME>RoutineInfo</NAME>
              <BYTE_SIZE>1</BYTE_SIZE>
              <SUB_FIELD ID="routine_0301_subfield_2">
                <NAME>RoutineType</NAME>
                <LEAST_SIG_BIT>4</LEAST_SIG_BIT>
                <MOST_SIG_BIT>7</MOST_SIG_BIT>
                <DATA_DEFINITION>
                  <DATA_TYPE>enumerated</DATA_TYPE>
                  <ENUMERATED_PARAMETERS>
                    <ENUM_MEMBER>
                      <ENUM_VALUE>0x01</ENUM_VALUE>
                      <DESCRIPTION>Type 1</DESCRIPTION>
                    </ENUM_MEMBER>
                  </ENUMERATED_PARAMETERS>
                </DATA_DEFINITION>
              </SUB_FIELD>
              <SUB_FIELD ID="routine_0301_subfield_3">
                <NAME>RoutineStatus</NAME>
                <LEAST_SIG_BIT>0</LEAST_SIG_BIT>
                <MOST_SIG_BIT>3</MOST_SIG_BIT>
                <DATA_DEFINITION>
                  <DATA_TYPE>enumerated</DATA_TYPE>
                  <ENUMERATED_PARAMETERS>
                    <ENUM_MEMBER>
                      <ENUM_VALUE>0x00</ENUM_VALUE>
                      <DESCRIPTION>completed</DESCRIPTION>
                    </ENUM_MEMBER>
                  </ENUMERATED_PARAMETERS>
                </DATA_DEFINITION>
              </SUB_FIELD>
            </ROUTINE_PARAM>
          </ROUTINE_RESPONSE_PARAMETERS>
        </ROUTINE_START_PARAMETERS>
      </ROUTINE>
      <ROUTINE ID="routine_0304" SERVICE_REFS="service_31" SESSION_REFS="session_02">
        <NAME>Check Valid Application</NAME>
        <NUMBER>0x0304</NUMBER>
        <MAX_ROUTINE_RUN_TIME>200</MAX_ROUTINE_RUN_TIME>
        <RESTART_WHILE_RUNNING>no</RESTART_WHILE_RUNNING>
        <ROUTINE_START_PARAMETERS>
          <ROUTINE_RESPONSE_PARAMETERS>
            <ROUTINE_PARAM>
              <NAME>RoutineInfo</NAME>
              <BYTE_SIZE>1</BYTE_SIZE>
              <SUB_FIELD ID="routine_0304_subfield_1">
                <NAME>RoutineType</NAME>
                <LEAST_SIG_BIT>4</LEAST_SIG_BIT>
                <MOST_SIG_BIT>7</MOST_SIG_BIT>
                <DATA_DEFINITION>
                  <DATA_TYPE>enumerated</DATA_TYPE>
                  <ENUMERATED_PARAMETERS>
                    <ENUM_MEMBER>
                      <ENUM_VALUE>0x01</ENUM_VALUE>
                      <DESCRIPTION>Type 1</DESCRIPTION>
                    </ENUM_MEMBER>
                  </ENUMERATED_PARAMETERS>
                </DATA_DEFINITION>
              </SUB_FIELD>
              <SUB_FIELD ID="routine_0304_subfield_2">
                <NAME>RoutineStatus</NAME>
                <LEAST_SIG_BIT>0</LEAST_SIG_BIT>
                <MOST_SIG_BIT>3</MOST_SIG_BIT>
                <DATA_DEFINITION>
                  <DATA_TYPE>enumerated</DATA_TYPE>
                  <ENUMERATED_PARAMETERS>
                    <ENUM_MEMBER>
                      <ENUM_VALUE>0x00</ENUM_VALUE>
                      <DESCRIPTION>completed</DESCRIPTION>
                    </ENUM_MEMBER>
                  </ENUMERATED_PARAMETERS>
                </DATA_DEFINITION>
              </SUB_FIELD>
            </ROUTINE_PARAM>
            <ROUTINE_PARAM>
              <NAME>Response Additional Data</NAME>
              <BYTE_SIZE>1</BYTE_SIZE>
              <SUB_FIELD ID="routine_0304_subfield_3">
                <NAME>Application Status</NAME>
                <LEAST_SIG_BIT>0</LEAST_SIG_BIT>
                <MOST_SIG_BIT>7</MOST_SIG_BIT>
                <DATA_DEFINITION>
                  <DATA_TYPE>enumerated</DATA_TYPE>
                  <ENUMERATED_PARAMETERS>
                    <ENUM_MEMBER>
                      <ENUM_VALUE>0x01</ENUM_VALUE>
                      <DESCRIPTION>Valid Application Software is NOT Present</DESCRIPTION>
                    </ENUM_MEMBER>
                    <ENUM_MEMBER>
                      <ENUM_VALUE>0x02</ENUM_VALUE>
                      <DESCRIPTION>Valid Application Software is  Present</DESCRIPTION>
                    </ENUM_MEMBER>
                  </ENUMERATED_PARAMETERS>
                </DATA_DEFINITION>
              </SUB_FIELD>
            </ROUTINE_PARAM>
          </ROUTINE_RESPONSE_PARAMETERS>
        </ROUTINE_START_PARAMETERS>
      </ROUTINE>
      <ROUTINE ID="routine_200E" SERVICE_REFS="service_31" SESSION_REFS="session_03 session_60" SECURITY_REFS="security_level_2 security_level_3">
        <NAME>Calibrate Steering Angle Centre Position</NAME>
        <NUMBER>0x200E</NUMBER>
        <MAX_ROUTINE_RUN_TIME>200</MAX_ROUTINE_RUN_TIME>
        <RESTART_WHILE_RUNNING>no</RESTART_WHILE_RUNNING>
        <ROUTINE_START_PARAMETERS>
          <ROUTINE_RESPONSE_PARAMETERS>
            <ROUTINE_PARAM>
              <NAME>RoutineInfo</NAME>
              <BYTE_SIZE>1</BYTE_SIZE>
              <SUB_FIELD ID="routine_200E_subfield_1">
                <NAME>RoutineType</NAME>
                <LEAST_SIG_BIT>4</LEAST_SIG_BIT>
                <MOST_SIG_BIT>7</MOST_SIG_BIT>
                <DATA_DEFINITION>
                  <DATA_TYPE>enumerated</DATA_TYPE>
                  <ENUMERATED_PARAMETERS>

      <ROUTINE ID="routine_0202" SERVICE_REFS="service_31" SESSION_REFS="session_03 session_60">
        <NAME>On-Demand Self-Test</NAME>
        <NUMBER>0x0202</NUMBER>
        <DESCRIPTION>All active DTCs that were reported since startup are collected here by this routine.



The routine-result after every call gives back the oldest DTC. If there are no more DTCs present the routine-result will return with a negative response.</DESCRIPTION>
        <MAX_ROUTINE_RUN_TIME>5000</MAX_ROUTINE_RUN_TIME>
        <RESTART_WHILE_RUNNING>no</RESTART_WHILE_RUNNING>
        <ENTRY_CONDITIONS>unused</ENTRY_CONDITIONS>
        <ROUTINE_START_PARAMETERS>
          <ROUTINE_RESPONSE_PARAMETERS>
            <ROUTINE_PARAM>
              <NAME>RoutineInfo</NAME>
              <BYTE_SIZE>1</BYTE_SIZE>
              <SUB_FIELD ID="routine_0202_subfield_1">
                <NAME>RoutineType</NAME>
                <LEAST_SIG_BIT>4</LEAST_SIG_BIT>
                <MOST_SIG_BIT>7</MOST_SIG_BIT>
                <DATA_DEFINITION>
                  <DATA_TYPE>enumerated</DATA_TYPE>
                  <ENUMERATED_PARAMETERS>
                    <ENUM_MEMBER>
                      <ENUM_VALUE>0x02</ENUM_VALUE>
                      <DESCRIPTION>Type 2</DESCRIPTION>
                    </ENUM_MEMBER>
                  </ENUMERATED_PARAMETERS>
                </DATA_DEFINITION>
              </SUB_FIELD>
              <SUB_FIELD ID="routine_0202_subfield_2">

  <SPECIAL_PROCEDURES>
    <PROCEDURE AUDIENCE="special_apps">
      <NAME>Procedure for Reset Assist Fault Counters (0xDC00)</NAME>
      <DESCRIPTION>This procedure describe, how to restrain the system from no assist state because of the limp home counters reached the limits.</DESCRIPTION>
      <PROCEDURE_STEP>
        <NAME>Step 1</NAME>
        <NUMBER>0x01</NUMBER>
        <DESCRIPTION>Enter Extended diagnostic session.</DESCRIPTION>
      </PROCEDURE_STEP>
      <PROCEDURE_STEP>
        <NAME>Step 2</NAME>
        <NUMBER>0x02</NUMBER>
        <DESCRIPTION>Unlock security level 0x03.</DESCRIPTION>
      </PROCEDURE_STEP>
      <PROCEDURE_STEP>
        <NAME>Step 3</NAME>
        <NUMBER>0x03</NUMBER>
        <DESCRIPTION>Execute 0xDC00 - ResetAssist fault counters.</DESCRIPTION>
      </PROCEDURE_STEP>
      <PROCEDURE_STEP>
        <NAME>Step 4</NAME>
        <NUMBER>0x04</NUMBER>
        <DESCRIPTION>Restart the ECU.</DESCRIPTION>
      </PROCEDURE_STEP>
    </PROCEDURE>
  </SPECIAL_PROCEDURES>
</MDX>
